The Collections

Bridal Pouches

The signature piece of the atelier — a satin pouch gathered by hand around a strung pearl handle, made for your wedding day and every anniversary after.

From $48 · Made to order
The Signature Pouch
Handcrafted, Start to Finish

Built Like Jewelry, Carried Like a Keepsake

Every pouch begins as a single piece of satin, cut on the grain so the sheen runs in one continuous direction. The signature ruffle isn't sewn on — it is the bag, gathered by hand until the folds sit evenly.

  • Hand-strung freshwater pearl handle, knotted internally like a fine necklace
  • Enclosed seams — no raw edge anywhere your fingers can find
  • Holds the wedding-day essentials — lipstick, tissue, phone, and a keepsake or two
  • Checked against your order's color reference in natural light before wrapping

Six signature shades, or send a photo of your dresses for free custom color matching:

  • Ivory
  • Blush
  • Dusty Rose
  • Lavender
  • Dusty Blue
  • Sage
Begin Your Custom Order Also available on Etsy
Cut after you order · about two weeks in the making
